case_title: RAYNALDO, RONALD VS PATTERSON, LAMONT WILLIAM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,240.94 FILED BY RAYNALDO, RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT PATTERSON, LAMONT WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PATTERSON, LAMONT WILLIAM
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-30-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-28-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITHPREJUDICE.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-01-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-30-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $3237.96. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED IN 6 MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL PAID IN FULL, AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAYNALDO, RONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATTERSON, LAMONT WILLIAM $2,237.96 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,289.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR RAYNALDO, RONALD ASSIGNED TO THOMAS GIFF-HOBLYN DBA JJR
DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $200 PER MONTH BEGINNING ON JULY 2005 & ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL
PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO RONALD RAYNALDO RETURNED
